# FishKeeper (fishkeeper.ai)

> AI health checks for every tank and pond.

Upload a photo, get an instant disease diagnosis, treatment guide and water-quality action plan.

## What this is
FishKeeper is a vertical in the CSOAI Hive — EU AI Act / NIS2 / DORA compliant tooling exposed as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers callable by any AI agent.

## MCP tools
- fishkeeper-ai-mcp.diagnose_disease: Run AI disease diagnosis from any aquarium app or workflow.

## Discovery
- Agent card: https://fishkeeper.ai/agent.json
- MCP catalog: https://fishkeeper.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
- Sitemap: https://fishkeeper.ai/sitemap.xml
- Hive registry: https://csoai.org (271 published MCP servers)

## Pricing
See https://fishkeeper.ai/pricing/
